title: 20:12 â April 30, 2020
body_text:
20:12 â April 30, 2020
Update to the International Transfers Part
We added instructions on completing the International Transfers Implementation Requirements form and the optional International Transfers FX Spread form.
Electronic Transactions Volume
International Transfers
Section 1.2, International Transfers Workflow
We updated the International Transfers workflow description.
Section 1.3, International Transfer Limits
We updated the International Transfers transaction limit description.
Section 1.4, International Transfers Foreign Exchange (FX)
We added a new section to describe the optional FX spread that financial institutions can add to International Transfers transactions.
Section 1.5, International Transfers Document Library
We updated the document library as follows:
Removed the International Transfer Customization, Form 8944, as it is now obsolete.
Added the International Transfers Implementation Requirements, Form 9080.
Added the International Transfers FX Spread, Form 9111.
Added a link to the International Transfers Enrollment Guide on the secure site.
Section 3.1, Overview of Implementation
We updated this section to add a description of the International Transfers Implementation Requirements, Form 9080, and the International Transfers FX Spread, Form 9111.
Section 3.2, Completing the International Transfers Implementation Requirements Form
We added instructions on completing the form to configure the International Transfers product.
Section 3.3, Completing the International Transfers FX Spread Form (Optional)
We added instructions on completing the form to add an optional FX spread to International Transfers transactions.
The following changes were made to the Document Library:
Document Library
